title: encephalartos cerinus
intro: Encephalartos cerinus, also known as the Cape Fold Cycad or the Cape Cycad, is a species of cycad, a type of ancient, seed-producing plant. The plant is found in the southwestern region of South Africa and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The cycad's leaves and seeds have been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting infections. Encephalartos cerinus is typically harvested for its seeds, which are then prepared as herbal remedies, often in the form of infusions or decoctions, by traditional healers.
